zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Bowen於1574年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根斯萊德時，他的父親Phillip Bowen30歲，母親Elizabeth Vaughan26歲。他於大約1594年與Elen Franklen在威爾士格拉莫爾根利朗尼斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1633年在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根斯萊德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Bowen于1574年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根斯萊德时，他的父亲Phillip Bowen30岁，母亲Elizabeth Vaughan26岁。他于大约1594年与Elen Franklen在威尔士格拉莫爾根利朗尼斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1633年在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根斯萊德。

nameMeanings.name: Bowen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Owain ‘son of Owain’ (see Owen ), with fused patronymic marker (a)p, which is normally voiced before a vowel.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin ‘descendant of Buadhachán’, a diminutive of Buadhach ‘victorious’ (see Bohan ).
Irish: used to ‘translate’ Ó Cnáimhín ‘descendant of Cnáimhín’, a personal name meaning ‘little bone’ or ‘little body’, see Nevin 1.

variants.name: Bowan
meanings: Irish: variant of Bowen 2, from Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin ‘descendant of Buadhachán’.

variants.name: Bowens
meanings: Welsh, Irish (Mayo), and English: variant of Bowen , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Owen
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Owain, from Latin Eugenius (see Eugene ). This Welsh personal name is cognate with Old Irish Eogán, see 2 and 3.
Scottish and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Eoghain ‘son of Eoghan’. See McEwen .
Irish: from Ó hEoghain, ‘descendant of Eoghan’. See Ewen .

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Bowen was born in 1574, in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Phillip Bowen, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Vaughan, was 26. He married Elen Franklen about 1594, in Llangennith, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1633, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Bowen est né en 1574, à Slade, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Phillip Bowen, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Vaughan, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elen Franklen environ 1594, à Llangennith, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1633, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Slade, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Francis Bowen 1574 in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Phillip Bowen 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Vaughan 26. Er hat um 1594 in Llangennith, Glamorgan, Wales Elen Franklen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1633 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Bowen è nato il nel 1574 nel Slade, Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Phillip Bowen, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Vaughan, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elen Franklen circa 1594, nel Llangennith, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1633, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Slade, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Bowenが1574年にウェールズグラモーガンスラドで生まれた時，父Phillip Bowenは30歳，母Elizabeth Vaughanは26歳であった。約1594年にウェールズグラモーガンランジェニスでElen Franklenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1633年に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズグラモーガンスラドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Bowen(이)가 1574년 웨일스 글램르건 슬라드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Phillip Bowen(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Vaughan(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1594년 웨일스 글램르건 랭니스에서 Elen Franklen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1633년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 글램르건 슬라드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Bowen nasceu em 1574, em Slade, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Phillip Bowen, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Vaughan, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elen Franklen aproximadamente 1594, em Llangennith, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1633, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Slade, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Bowen родился в 1574 г. в местности слад, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Phillip Bowen было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Vaughan, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elen Franklen около 1594 г. в местности ллангеннит, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1633 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности слад, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Bowen nació en 1574, en Slade, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Phillip Bowen, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Vaughan, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elen Franklen aproximadamente 1594, en Llangennith, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1633, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Slade, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido.
